title: Help with a particular NGE songs
display_title: Help with a particular NGE songs
wikitext: []: Help with a particular NGE song(s)             Quote Post by skyynet » Mon Feb 06, 2017 12:19 am All of this predates any of the 1.0,2.0.3.11 movies, with 100% certainty, so don't bother with them. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- I was wondering if anyone could help me identify (& find) a song I believe was sung by Misato(Kotono Mitsuishi). I seem to remember it being located on the 1st of the 3 Saturn games (but I can't say for sure) by playing the Saturn disc as a music CD. There were maybe 2 or 3 audio tracks accessible, with one of them being simply some sort of message spoken in Japanese (possibly, "This disc is intended for [something, something, something or other]", voice of Rei/Megumi H.) If anyone could lend some insight, short of buying the games, that would be most excellent. (Lastly, I keep thinking the title contains the word 'soldier', but that's probably only because Kotono Mitsuishi did the voice of Sailor Moon) P.S.S. There's also another song I have far less info about that was used in an NGE AMV(anime music video?) The video editing was very good, with great transitions, ending in panning shots of black&white manga (mostly Shinji/Asuka?) I cannot say that the song was in any way related to NGE, but the video might've been from MAD?

I seem to remember it being located on the 1st of the 3 Saturn games (but I can't say for sure) by playing the Saturn disc as a music CD. There were maybe 2 or 3 audio tracks accessible, with one of them being simply some sort of message spoken in Japanese (possibly, "This disc is intended for [something, something, something or other]", voice of Rei/Megumi H.) There's also another song I have far less info about that was used in an NGE AMV(anime music video?) The video editing was very good, with great transitions, ending in panning shots of black&white manga (mostly Shinji/Asuka?)
